Class NativeCPULinearAlgebraRealBackend

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.backends.AbstractNativeCPULinearAlgebraBackend<Real>
org.episteme.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.backends.NativeCPULinearAlgebraRealBackend
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, LinearAlgebraProvider<Real>, AlgorithmProvider, Backend, ComputeBackend, CPUBackend, NativeBackend
@AutoService({Backend.class,ComputeBackend.class,NativeBackend.class,LinearAlgebraProvider.class,CPUBackend.class,AlgorithmProvider.class}) public class NativeCPULinearAlgebraRealBackend extends AbstractNativeCPULinearAlgebraBackend<Real>
Concrete Native CPU-BLAS provider for Real numbers.
